agents.name: PR Review Sentinel
agents.summary: Review pull requests against team conventions, flag risky changes, and post structured, actionable feedback.

agents.name: Browser QA Runner
agents.summary: Walk critical user flows in a real browser, capture evidence, and file reproducible bug reports.

agents.name: API Contract Guardian
agents.summary: Detect drift between API specs, real behavior, and docs; draft changelogs, migration notes, and fixes.

agents.name: Competitive Intel Scout
agents.summary: Track competitors' pricing, changelogs, and traffic; report evidence-cited changes since the last check.

agents.name: Churn Risk Sentinel
agents.summary: Correlate usage drop-off with billing events, remember account history, and propose specific save plays.

agents.name: Inbound Lead Qualifier
agents.summary: Qualify site visitors conversationally, score fit against your ICP, and hand sales a context-rich lead.

agents.name: AI Search Visibility Analyst
agents.summary: Measure how your brand appears in AI answers and search, diagnose citation gaps, and prioritize content fixes.

agents.name: Spend & Subscription Controller
agents.summary: Flag card-spend anomalies, upcoming SaaS renewals, and duplicate subscriptions with owner-ready actions.

agents.name: Chief of Staff (WhatsApp)
agents.summary: A pocket chief of staff: captures tasks from quick messages, tracks commitments, and remembers what matters across weeks.

agents.name: Developer Community Manager
agents.summary: Triage community questions, escalate real bugs with reproductions, and turn recurring pain into roadmap signal.

agents.name: Telegram Assistant Starter
agents.summary: Message a Telegram bot and it replies per your instructions. The blank canvas — edit instructions.md and nothing else.

agents.name: Discord Docs Starter
agents.summary: Answers Discord questions from a single knowledge.md FAQ you paste in. Demos giving an agent knowledge.

agents.name: GitHub Issue Labeler Starter
agents.summary: New issue opened → applies one label from your taxonomy and asks for repro steps when a bug report is thin.

agents.name: Linear Triage Starter
agents.summary: Delegated Linear tickets get a priority and team recommendation from rules in your instructions.

agents.name: Daily Digest Starter
agents.summary: Weekday 9am UTC: fetch one RSS feed and post a five-item summary to Slack. Demos cron schedules.

agents.name: Uptime Watch Starter
agents.summary: Checks one URL every 5 minutes and Telegram-alerts you only when it goes down or recovers.

agents.name: SMS Reminder Starter
agents.summary: Text "remind me Thursday at 9" via Twilio and get texted back at that time. Demos dynamic scheduling.

agents.name: Approval Gate Starter
agents.summary: Refunds always need Slack approval; service restarts use once(). Tool bodies log only — swap in real actions.

agents.name: OpenAPI Chat Starter
agents.summary: Chat with any HTTP API in plain English. Ships on Swagger Petstore; swap OPENAPI_SPEC_URL for yours.

agents.name: Webhook Summarizer Starter
agents.summary: POST any text to a custom webhook and get a classified summary in Slack. Demos custom channels.

agents.name: Cron Task Starter
agents.summary: A fire-and-forget weekly task as a plain markdown schedule — cron in frontmatter, prompt in the body.

agents.name: Receipt Scanner Starter
agents.summary: Photo a receipt in Telegram and get merchant, total, category, and line items back. Demos attachments.

agents.name: Translator Starter
agents.summary: Paste text, get it back in TARGET_LANGUAGE. Instructions-only — the entire product is the prompt.

agents.name: Headless API Starter
agents.summary: Drive an agent with curl or eve/client — no chat UI. Demos the default HTTP session protocol.

agents.name: Evals Playground Starter
agents.summary: A tiny agent plus numbered evals teaching succeeded, calledTool, parked, check, and judge.

extensions.name: HTTP Monitor
extensions.summary: Check any URL from a tool call: status, latency, and change detection against the last check in the session. Timeout is mount config.

extensions.name: KV Memory
extensions.summary: Session-scoped key/value memory: remember, recall, and forget tools backed by eve state. No external store, fully deterministic.
